title: koyamacalia latipes
intro: Koyamacalia latipes, also known as the Japanese mountain gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. Koyamacalia latipes can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
